content: Just as the language learning definition of reflexion frames it as both a literal reflection of light/sound and a metacognitive act of reviewing one's own writing to deepen understanding, the AI Reflexion agent framework can be extended to integrate the multiple inconsistent perspectives at the core of modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms by treating each perspective as a different 'light source' reflected back to the agent to uncover blind spots in its outputs. This multi-source reflection framework would make LLM self-reflection far more robust than single-perspective self-critique.
